name: Jerry Martin's Kick-back, Relax & Stir-up-a-Success
recipeIngredient: 1 Yellow bell pepper, cut into strips
1 package Success White or Brown Rice, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or wok, heat 2 tablespoons oil over medium heat.
2. Add ginger and garlic to the hot oil. Cook for about 30 seconds.
3. Add chicken strips to the pan. Stir fry until the chicken is browned, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken from the pan using a slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Pour out any remaining oil in the pan.
6. Add broccoli, onion, and pepper to the pan. Stir fry for 1 minute.
7. Add tomatoes to the pan and return the chicken to the pan with the vegetables.
8. Add stir fry cooking sauce and heat until the sauce is well incorporated and heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
9. Serve over hot cooked rice. This recipe serves 2-4 people.
